scoring: binary — partial credit is a fail
shared_gate: scope (regulation/contract/control library) named explicitly; no silent assumptions
every non-obvious claim carries exactly one Alfa-core tag (CODIGO/CONFIG/DOC/INFERENCIA/SUPUESTO), one spelling
every [SUPUESTO] paired with a concrete verification step
verbatim legal disclaimer present and unaltered
no PASS/compliant asserted as fact; no invented clause numbers, control IDs, fines, or citations

compliance-assessment: gap matrix covers 100% of framework requirements (every control ID present, not sampled)
every gap row has severity, evidence tag, residual-risk score, owner role, effort band
heat map and matrix use the single scoring method — no scale drift
every roadmap action maps to >=1 gap ID; no critical/high gap left unremediated
out-of-scope frameworks stated explicitly (guard against false completeness)
compliance-framework: every control row carries a status AND a locatable evidence pointer
no 'met' without a locatable artifact (else downgrade to gap)
framework version pinned; evidence dated against the audit window
gaps have an owner and a next step
contract-review: every Step-2 checklist clause addressed or explicitly marked N/A
each finding has risk level, impact, recommended action, and provenance tag
every High finding carries a negotiable fallback position
findings ranked by exposure (likelihood x business impact), not clause order
